case_title: MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION VS. WILLIAMS SONOMA, INC.

docket_entries.description: MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-15-2019 VACATED. CONSENT JUDGMENT FILED ON 12/17/18. (206)

MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-17-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT WILLIAMS SONOMA, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Williams, Esq., Law Offices of David Williams, Telephone 510-847-2356. appearing for Plaintiff;
No Other appearances

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Mateel Environmental Justice Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Williams Sonoma, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Set For Trial On Jul-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
